name: esdm2symfony/generator
description: Generate runnable event-sourced code from an ESDM model. Adapter-based: one target per framework + database + event-sourcing library.

scripts-descriptions.test: Generator unit tests, then run the GWT tests the generator EMITS (needs mbstring — run in the php container).
scripts-descriptions.test:emitted: Generate each example's EventSourcingDB target and execute its emitted PHPUnit decider tests.
